answers: Methods: Cornell (divide page into sections), outline (hierarchical), mind map (visual), and Zettelkasten (linked notes).
Digital vs paper: paper aids memory (writing by hand). Digital is searchable and organized. Use what works for you.
Tips: don't transcribe everything — capture key concepts, use your own words, review within 24 hours.
Best apps: Notion (powerful), Obsidian (linked notes), OneNote (free), and simple pen + paper still works great.
